steps.explanation: The equation \((x+3)^2+(y-1)^2=25\) has center \((-3,1)\) and radius \(5\). A point is in the interior when \((x+3)^2+(y-1)^2 < 25\), and NOT in the interior when \(\geq 25\).

• A \((-7,3)\): value 20 < 25 — inside the circle. Eliminated.
  • B \((-3,1)\): value 0 < 25 — the center itself, inside. Eliminated.
  • C \((0,0)\): value 10 < 25 — inside the circle. Eliminated.
  • D \((3,2)\): value 37 > 25 — outside the circle, not in the interior. That matches choice D — D is correct.
